channel.description: Fresh easy-vegan-posts posts and cooking inspiration

item.title: Fresh Vegan Spring Roll Bowls with Creamy Peanut Sauce
item.description: These vegan spring roll bowls are packed with crunchy veggies and a creamy peanut sauce that’s just irresistible. They’re perfect for a light lunch or easy dinner when you want something fresh and satisfying.
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 15 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 0 minutes

⏰ Total Time: N/A minutes

🍽️ Servings: 4

📊 Difficulty: Easy

🥘 Ingredients

  • 2 cups shredded red cabbage, raw
  • 1 large carrot, julienned
  • 1 cucumber, thinly sliced
  • 1 cup cooked rice noodles, cooled
  • 1 avocado, sliced
  • 1/4 cup fresh cilantro, chopped
  • 1/4 cup fresh mint leaves, chopped
  • 1/2 cup chopped roasted peanuts
  • For the peanut sauce:
  • 1/3 cup creamy peanut butter
  • 2 tablespoons soy sauce
  • 1 tablespoon maple syrup
  • 1 tablespoon lime juice
  • 1 teaspoon grated fresh ginger
  • 1 garlic clove, minced
  • Water to thin as needed

👩‍🍳 Instructions

📌 Pinterest Tags: #cat1761230119510 #Easypost #quickpost #30minutemeals #post #cooking #foodie #homemade #delicious #shredded #large #cucumber

📌 Save this post to Pinterest!

Perfect for meal planning and sharing with friends

media:content.media:title: Fresh Vegan Spring Roll Bowls with Creamy Peanut Sauce
media:content.media:description: These vegan spring roll bowls are packed with crunchy veggies and a creamy peanut sauce that’s just irresistible. They’re perfect for a light lunch or easy dinner when you want something fresh and satisfying.
